types.name: Water
types.effects: Ground units pushed into water are killed instantly. Flying units survive. Removes Fire status from units. Freezing water creates Ice tiles.
types.notes: One of the most powerful environmental kills. Push Vek into water whenever possible. Mechs cannot enter water tiles (except flying mechs which hover over).

types.name: Mountain
types.effects: Impassable obstacle. Blocks movement and projectiles. Cannot be destroyed by normal attacks. Some weapons can destroy mountains.
types.notes: Block line-of-sight for ranged attacks. Can be used as cover. Cataclysm squad can destroy them.

types.name: Building
types.effects: Civilian structures tied to Grid Power. Damage to buildings reduces Grid Power. Buildings have a Grid Defense % chance to resist damage.
types.notes: Protecting buildings is the primary objective. Each building lost reduces Grid Power. At 0 Grid Power, game over.

types.name: Forest
types.effects: Taking fire damage or being set on fire converts to a Fire tile. Units on forest tiles when fire starts catch fire. Fire spreads.
types.notes: Can be strategically set on fire to create persistent damage zones. Good for Flame Behemoths.

types.name: Sand
types.effects: When hit by any attack, converts to Smoke tile. Smoke prevents attacks and repairs.
types.notes: Found on R.S.T. island. Useful for creating smoke to cancel enemy attacks.

types.name: Ice
types.effects: When damaged, cracks. Second hit destroys, creating Water tile. Units on cracked ice when it breaks fall into water (killed if ground unit).
types.notes: Found on Pinnacle island. Two-step destruction: intact -> cracked -> water.

types.name: Lava
types.effects: Ground units take 1 fire damage and catch fire when entering or ending turn on lava. Flying units unaffected. Does not extinguish — permanent hazard.
types.notes: Appears on Volcanic Hive (final mission). Treat like fire tiles. Push enemies into lava.

types.name: Chasm
types.effects: Any non-flying unit pushed into a chasm dies instantly. Frozen flying units pushed into chasms also die (they can't fly while frozen).
types.notes: Instant kill like water. Found on R.S.T. island and created by Cataclysm squad.

types.name: Conveyor Belt
types.effects: At end of turn, all units on conveyor belt tiles are pushed 1 tile in the belt's direction.
types.notes: Found on Detritus island. Can push mechs, Vek, and objects. Plan positioning around belt direction.

types.name: A.C.I.D. Pool
types.effects: Units entering or spawning on A.C.I.D. pool tiles gain A.C.I.D. status (double damage from weapons).
types.notes: Found on Detritus island. Push enemies into pools to apply A.C.I.D., then hit them for double damage.

types.name: Teleporter Pad
types.effects: Teleporter pads come in pairs. Units pushed onto one pad are teleported to the other pad.
types.notes: Found on Pinnacle island. Can teleport Vek to unexpected positions. Use for creative kills.

types.name: Fire Tile
types.effects: Units entering or ending turn on fire tiles take 1 damage and catch fire. Persists until extinguished by smoke, ice, or water.
types.notes: Created by fire attacks, burning forests, and some environmental effects.

types.name: Smoke Tile
types.effects: Units in smoke cannot attack or repair. Cancels enemy attacks even after the enemy moves out of smoke. Extinguishes fire tiles.
types.notes: Key mechanic for Rusting Hulks. Smoke interrupts ALL enemy actions for the turn.

types.name: Cracked Ground
types.effects: Indicates a Vek will emerge from this tile at end of turn. Can be blocked by placing a unit on it.
types.notes: Visible as cracks/dirt patterns. Block by standing on tile to prevent emergence.

status_effects.name: Fire
status_effects.effect: Unit takes 1 damage at the START of each turn. Persists until removed.
status_effects.applied_by: Fire attacks, fire tiles, burning forests, lava
status_effects.removed_by: Repairing, entering water, entering smoke, being frozen then unfrozen
interactions: Shield blocks fire application but does not prevent existing fire damage
Fire melts ice tiles instantly
Frozen units hit by fire unfreeze AND catch fire simultaneously
Trains, buildings, and Renfield Bombs are fire-immune
Burrowers lose fire when they burrow underground

status_effects.name: Frozen
status_effects.effect: Unit cannot move, attack, or take actions. Any damage to a frozen unit is negated but unfreezes it. Frozen units on water create ice tiles instead of drowning.
status_effects.applied_by: Cryo-Launcher, ice attacks, environmental ice effects
status_effects.removed_by: Taking any damage (damage is negated), repairing (uses action to break free)
interactions: Frozen flying units are grounded — can fall into water/chasms and die
Frozen enemies cannot attack (cancels their telegraphed attack)
Frozen units on spawn points block emergence
Ice Mech freezes itself when using Cryo-Launcher (unless shielded)
Shield prevents freezing
Frozen units pushed into water stay on ice (water freezes under them)

status_effects.name: Shield
status_effects.effect: Blocks the next instance of damage AND prevents application of negative status effects (Fire, Frozen, A.C.I.D., Web). Consumed on first hit.
status_effects.applied_by: Defense Mech shield, Bethany Jones ability, Mafan (Zoltan) ability, some upgrades
status_effects.removed_by: Taking direct damage (shield absorbs the hit and breaks)
interactions: Shields do NOT remove existing status effects — only prevent new ones
Shields prevent Fire damage from fire tiles
Shields prevent A.C.I.D. application
Shields prevent Freezing
Shields on buildings protect them from one attack
Multiple shields do not stack — a unit either has shield or doesn't

status_effects.name: Smoke
status_effects.effect: Units in smoke cannot attack or repair. Enemy attacks are cancelled for the entire turn even if enemy moves out of smoke.
status_effects.applied_by: Smoke attacks, sand tiles being hit, Storm Generator, various weapons
status_effects.removed_by: Smoke dissipates after the turn it was applied (lasts 1 full turn cycle)
interactions: Smoke extinguishes fire tiles when applied
Smoke extinguishes burning units
Storm Generator (Rusting Hulks passive) deals 1 damage to all enemies in smoke
Camila Vera is immune to smoke effects
Smoke prevents satellite launches on Pinnacle
Even if an enemy is pushed OUT of smoke after being smoked, its attack is still cancelled for that turn

status_effects.name: A.C.I.D.
status_effects.effect: Weapon damage against this unit is DOUBLED. Natural Armor is disabled.
status_effects.applied_by: Centipede attacks, A.C.I.D. pool tiles, some weapons
interactions: Stacks with damage bonuses from other sources
Nullifies Shell Psion's armor buff
Kills of A.C.I.D.-affected units leave acid tiles behind
Flying units avoid A.C.I.D. pool tile effects
Shield prevents A.C.I.D. application
Essential for 'Overkill' achievement (8 damage to single unit)

status_effects.name: Webbed
status_effects.effect: Unit cannot move but CAN still attack and use abilities.
status_effects.applied_by: Leaper landing, Scorpion attacks, Spider egg hatching
status_effects.removed_by: Does not expire naturally — lasts until freed. Freed by: repair, or killing the source
interactions: Camila Vera is immune to webbing
Shield prevents web application
Webbed mechs can still attack and use weapons — only movement is restricted
Webbed Vek can still attack from current position

status_effects.name: Boosted
status_effects.effect: Unit's next attack deals +1 damage. Consumed on any ability use (including non-damaging abilities and repair). Boosted repair heals 2 HP instead of 1.
status_effects.applied_by: Raging Psion, Morgan Lejeune kills, Kai Miller full HP, stepping on fire (Heat Sinkers), some weapons
interactions: Affects ALL targets of an attack, including self-damage
Consumed even by non-damaging abilities like shields or teleports
Boosted repair heals 2 instead of 1
Can be very dangerous on Vek with area attacks

status_effects.name: Armored
status_effects.effect: Reduces all incoming damage by 1 (minimum 1 damage). Does not reduce self-damage.
status_effects.applied_by: Abe Isamu ability, Shell Psion buff, Hook Mech natural armor, Judo Mech natural armor
status_effects.removed_by: Shell Psion death (removes Psion-granted armor), A.C.I.D. (disables armor)
interactions: Minimum 1 damage still applies — armor doesn't negate 1-damage attacks
A.C.I.D. completely disables armor
Does not reduce self-damage from weapons like Charge Mech or Leap Mech
Self-damage is mitigated by armor (actually Abe's armor does reduce some self-damage)

basic_rules: Damage is applied immediately when an attack resolves
All player attacks resolve simultaneously when 'End Turn' is pressed
Then all enemy attacks resolve in order
Units pushed into walls or other units take 1 bump damage
Units pushed into water/chasms die (unless flying or frozen-on-water)

push_mechanics.description: Many attacks push targets. Push interactions are critical.
rules: Push moves target 1 tile in the specified direction
If target cannot move (wall, mountain, edge of map, another unit), target takes 1 bump damage instead
If two units collide from a push, BOTH take 1 bump damage
Pushing into water kills ground units instantly
Pushing into chasms kills non-flying units instantly
Pushing into fire tiles sets unit on fire
Pushing onto conveyor belts: conveyor effect applies at end of turn
Pushing frozen flying units into water/chasms kills them (frozen = grounded)

grid_power.description: Grid Power represents the overall power grid of the civilian buildings. At 0, game over.
grid_power.losing_power: Each building destroyed reduces Grid Power by 1
grid_power.grid_defense: Buildings have a % chance (starts ~15%) to resist damage. Can be increased by pilot perks.
grid_power.gaining_power: Grid Power can be restored via: mission rewards, reputation purchases at the shop, some pilot abilities
grid_power.game_over: If Grid Power reaches 0, the timeline is lost. One pilot can be sent back.

phases.name: Player Planning Phase
phases.description: View all enemy telegraphed attacks. Plan and queue mech actions (move + attack for each mech). Order matters — some actions create openings for others.

phases.name: Player Action Resolution
phases.description: All queued mech actions execute. Damage, pushes, and effects resolve. Fire/status effects from player weapons apply.

phases.name: Environmental Effects
phases.description: Fire damage ticks (1 damage to burning units). Conveyor belts move units. Environmental hazards trigger (tidal waves, air strikes, lightning, etc). A.C.I.D. damage applies.

phases.name: Enemy Attack Phase
phases.description: All surviving Vek execute their telegraphed attacks. Attacks happen in a fixed order. Killed/frozen/smoked Vek do not attack.

phases.name: Spawn Phase
phases.description: New Vek emerge from ground crack tiles. Blocked spawns deal 1 damage to the Vek instead. New Vek telegraph their attacks for next turn.

important_notes: Fire damage from being on fire happens BEFORE enemy attacks — can kill a Vek before it attacks
Environmental effects (tidal waves, air strikes) happen BEFORE enemy attacks
Smoke cancels enemy attacks for the ENTIRE turn, even if enemy moves out of smoke
Blocked spawns damage but don't kill the Vek — it will try again next turn
The player always acts first, giving perfect information advantage

easy.notes: Recommended for learning. All achievements except 'Hard Victory' can be earned on Easy.

normal.notes: Default difficulty. Good balance of challenge and achievement hunting.

hard.enemy_count: More enemies per battle, more spawns
hard.notes: Required for 'Hard Victory' achievement. Significantly harder.

unfair.notes: Advanced Edition difficulty. Extremely challenging. No specific achievements require Unfair.

advanced_edition_mechanics.bosses: AE adds Boss Vek encounters at the end of each island. Bosses have unique mechanics and high HP.
advanced_edition_mechanics.unfair_difficulty: New maximum difficulty level with more enemies, more Alphas, and less starting grid power.
advanced_edition_mechanics.new_psions: Added Arachnid Psion (spawn spiderlings on death) and Raging Psion (all Vek boosted).
advanced_edition_mechanics.boost_mechanic: New status effect. +1 damage on next ability use. Central to Heat Sinkers squad.
advanced_edition_mechanics.new_vek: Added Bouncer and Moth Vek types.
advanced_edition_mechanics.new_squads: Added 5 new squads: Bombermechs, Arachnophiles, Mist Eaters, Heat Sinkers, Cataclysm.
advanced_edition_mechanics.new_pilots: Added 4 new pilots: Kai Miller, Rosie Rivets, Morgan Lejeune, Adam.
advanced_edition_mechanics.new_weapons: Additional purchasable weapons available in shops.
